title: Chapter 6
text: PLAYLIST The Wolf in Your Darkest Room – Matthew Mayfield Family – Badflower Rehab – Weathers Fourth of July – Sufjan Stevens Heartless – The Weekend Devil Side – Foxes You and I - PVRIS Who Are You – SVRCINA Villains – Mainland Mercy – Hurts Heathens – Twenty One Pilots Who’s in Control – Set it Off Fireflies – Owl City Alone in a Room (Acoustic Version) – Asking Alexandria Man or a Monster – Sam Tinnesz & Zayde Wolf You can find the complete playlist on Spotify .
